name: Cheddar Pennies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a food processor and process until a dough forms.
2. Divide the dough into three portions. Roll each portion into a 1-inch log.
3. Optionally, roll the logs in poppy seeds or toasted sesame seeds.
4. Wrap each log tightly in aluminum foil and refrigerate for at least 4 hours until very firm.
5. Slice the logs into 1/8-inch "pennies."
6. Place the slices on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for about 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and let stand for 2 or 3 minutes before placing on a rack to cool completely.
8. Store these cheddar pennies in an air-tight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
9. To reheat, place in a preheated oven at 450°F (230°C) for 2 to 3 minutes or until crisp.
